question: Which of the following is true for UAPL application?

options.text: Be at least 16 years old, pass theory test and practical assessment.
Be at least 18 years old, pass theory test and practical assessment.
Be at least 16 years old, completed UABT, pass theory test and practical assessment.
Be at least 18 years old, completed UABT, pass theory test and practical assessment.
